steps.title: Use constant rate
steps.content: A constant work rate means the number of shirts remaining changes by the same amount over each equal time interval. That makes the model linear.

steps.title: Determine the slope sign
steps.content: As time increases, the number of shirts remaining decreases. A linear model that decreases has a negative slope.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: A sample constant-rate model such as $y=120-15x$ shows the same decreasing linear pattern. The answer is B.
